2fa_enabled_success: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully
2fa_required: Please enter your two-factor authentication code
account_has_journal_entries: Cannot delete account because it has posted journal entries

account_used_in_budgets: Cannot delete account because it is used in budgets
adjustment_negative_quantity: Cannot set inventory quantity to a negative value
adjustment_quantity_no_change: New quantity matches current quantity — no adjustment needed
adjustment_warehouse_outside_branch: Cannot make adjustments for a warehouse outside your branches
admin_2fa_required: Please enter the admin two-factor authentication code
ar_sales_revenue_accounts_incomplete: Account settings are incomplete (AR / Sales Revenue)
asset_disposal_entry_already_posted: A disposal journal entry for this asset was already posted
asset_loss_account_not_configured: Asset loss account is not configured in settings
asset_not_found_or_disposed: Asset not found or has already been disposed
asset_source_dest_branch_same: Source and destination branches are the same
attendance_daily_limit_exceeded: Daily attendance registration limit exceeded (3 times)
audit_view_not_authorized_for_branch: You are not authorized to view audit logs for this branch
backup_codes_warning: Keep recovery codes in a safe place. They will not be shown again
bad_debt_accounts_not_configured: Bad debt accounts are not configured in settings

bom_has_active_production_orders: Cannot delete BOM because it has active production orders
branch_has_linked_operations: Cannot delete the branch because it has linked operations

cannot_ship_same_warehouse: Cannot ship from and to the same warehouse
cash_main_account_not_found: Cash main account not found in chart of accounts (1101)
change_order_approve_invalid_status: Cannot approve change order with status '{status}'

company_code_invalid_or_inactive: Company code is incorrect or company is inactive
company_code_required: Company code is required. You can get it from your company administrator
company_data_not_ready: Company data is not ready yet. Please re-login or contact support

contract_number_duplicate: Contract number already exists. Use a different number
credit_note_must_link_sales_invoice: Credit note must be linked to a sales invoice

customer_access_outside_branch: You cannot access customer data outside your branches

customer_group_has_customers: Cannot delete the group because it is linked to customers
cycle_count_not_draft: Cannot start a cycle count that is not in draft status

employee_overallocated_warning: Employee is allocated at {total}% (exceeds 100%) for the overlapping period

employment_date_not_set: Employment date is not set for this employee
equity_account_not_found_for_offset: No equity account found to offset opening balance differences

exchange_rate_must_be_greater_than_zero: New exchange rate must be greater than zero

opportunity_customer_required_for_conver: A customer must be assigned to the opportunity before conversion

password_policy_not_met: Password does not meet policy requirements
password_reset_email_sent: If the email is registered, a reset link will be sent
password_reset_success: Password changed successfully. Please log in
password_reuse_not_allowed: Cannot reuse a password used in the last {prevent_reuse} times
product_code_used_by_another: Product code is already used by another product
product_has_stock_balance: Cannot delete a product that has stock balance
product_has_transactions: Cannot delete a product that has previous transactions
